'); } } // --- 3. =====================================================
*/
if(!defined('DATALIFEENGINE')) die("Hacking attempt!");

// 1. Giri┼θ ve Yetki Kontrol├╝
if(!$is_logged) {
    msgbox(fl('forum_error'), fl('forum_err_login_topic'));
    return;
}

if(!$Forum->canDo('create_topic')) {
    msgbox(fl('forum_error'), fl('forum_err_no_perm_cat'));
    return;
}

 $cat_id = isset($_REQUEST['cat_id']) ? intval($_REQUEST['cat_id']) : 0;
 $cat = $Forum->getCatById($cat_id);

if(!$cat) {
    msgbox(fl('forum_error'), fl('forum_err_cat_select'));
    return;
}

 $error = '';
// Form verilerini korumak i├πin de─θi┼θkenler
 $post_title_val = '';
 $post_content_val = '';

// 2. Form G├╢nderimi ve CSRF Kontrol├╝
if(isset($_POST['submit_topic'])) {
    
    // G├εVENL─░K: CSRF Token Do─θrulamas─▒
    if(!$Forum->verifyCsrf($_POST['csrf_token'] ?? '')) {
        $error = fl('forum_err_csrf_retry');
    } else {
        $title   = trim(strip_tags($_POST['topic_title'] ?? ''));
        $desc    = trim(strip_tags($_POST['description'] ?? ''));
        $content = trim($_POST['comments'] ?? $_POST['topic_content'] ?? '');
        
        $clean_content = trim(strip_tags(html_entity_decode($content, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8')));
        $clean_content = str_replace(' ', '', $clean_content);

        if(mb_strlen($title) < 3) {
            $error = fl('forum_err_title_len');
        } elseif(mb_strlen($title) > 255) {
            $error = fl('forum_err_title_long');
        } elseif(mb_strlen($clean_content) < 10) {
            $error = fl('forum_err_content_len');
        } else {
            $result = $Forum->createTopic($cat_id, $title, $content, $desc);
            if(isset($result['error'])) {
                $error = $result['error'];
            } else {
                $new_topic_id = intval($result['topic_id']);

                // Prefix kaydet
                $prefix_id = isset($_POST['prefix_id']) ? intval($_POST['prefix_id']) : 0;
                if($prefix_id > 0) {
                    $db->query("UPDATE " . PREFIX . "_forum_topics SET prefix_id='$prefix_id' WHERE id='$new_topic_id'");
                }

                // Etiketleri kaydet
                $tags_raw = isset($_POST['tags']) ? trim($_POST['tags']) : '';
                if($tags_raw !== '') {
                    $Forum->setTopicTags($new_topic_id, $tags_raw);
                }


                header("Location: " . forum_url('forum_topic', ['newsid' => $new_topic_id]));
                exit;
            }
        }
        
        if($error) {
            $post_title_val = htmlspecialchars($title);
            $post_content_val = htmlspecialchars($content);
        }
    }
}

 $parse = new ParseFilter();
 $editor_html = "";

if($config['allow_comments_wysiwyg'] == 1) {

    // shortsite.php i├πin gerekli de─θi┼θkenler
    $id         = 0;
    $dark_theme = '';
    $row        = [
        'short_story' => ($error ? $content : ''),
    ];

    // $onload_scripts ve $js_array mevcut de─θilse ba┼θlat
    if(!isset($onload_scripts)) $onload_scripts = [];
    if(!isset($js_array))       $js_array = [];

    $onload_before = count($onload_scripts);

    // shortsite.php: $onload_scripts[]'e TinyMCE init yazar,
    //                $shortarea'ya textarea HTML'ini koyar
    include_once(DLEPlugins::Check(ENGINE_DIR . '/editor/shortsite.php'));

    // Textarea: short_story έΗΤ comments (isim k├╢pr├╝s├╝)
    $shortarea = str_replace(
        ['name="short_story"', 'id="short_story"'],
        ['name="comments"',   'id="comments"'],
        $shortarea
    );

    // TinyMCE init scriptlerini $editor_html'e ekle
    $onload_after = count($onload_scripts);
    if($onload_after > $onload_before) {
        // tinymce.min.js'i y├╝kle (shortsite.php $js_array'e ekliyor ama
        // forum sayfas─▒nda bu array i┼θlenmeyebilir, script tag olarak ekleyelim)
        $tinymce_url   = $config['http_home_url'] . 'public/editor/tiny_mce/tinymce.min.js';
        $dlebutton_url = $config['http_home_url'] . 'public/editor/tiny_mce/plugins/dlebutton/plugin.min.js';

        $init_script = '';
        for($si = $onload_before; $si < $onload_after; $si++) {
            $init_script .= $onload_scripts[$si];
        }

        $editor_html = $shortarea . '
<script>
(function() {
    function runInit() {
        ' . $init_script . '
    }
    if(typeof tinymce !== "undefined") {
        runInit();
    } else {
        var s = document.createElement("script");
        s.src = "' . $tinymce_url . '";
        s.onload = function() {
            var s2 = document.createElement("script");
            s2.src = "' . $dlebutton_url . '";
            s2.onload = runInit;
            document.head.appendChild(s2);
        };
        document.head.appendChild(s);
    }
})();
</script>';
    } else {
        // Hi├π onload_script eklenmedi έΑΦ en az─▒ndan textarea'y─▒ g├╢ster
        $editor_html = $shortarea;
    }

} else {
    include_once(DLEPlugins::Check(ENGINE_DIR . '/editor/bbcode.php'));
    $editor_html = $bb_code;
}

// Hata sonras─▒ i├πerik geri y├╝kleme
if($error && $config['allow_comments_wysiwyg'] == 1) {
    $safe_text_js = json_encode($content, JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE);
    $editor_html .= "<script>
    jQuery(function(){
        var i = setInterval(function(){
            if(typeof tinymce !== 'undefined' && tinymce.get('comments') && tinymce.get('comments').initialized){
                tinymce.get('comments').setContent({$safe_text_js});
                clearInterval(i);
            }
        }, 200);
    });
    </script>";
}

global $text; 
if($error) {
    if($config['allow_comments_wysiwyg'] == 1) {
        $text = $content; 
    } else {
        $text = $post_content_val; 
    }
} else {
    $text = '';
}

// 4. Template ├Θ─▒kt─▒s─▒
 $tpl->load_template('forum/new_topic.tpl');
 $tpl->set('{cat_name}', htmlspecialchars($cat['name']));
 $tpl->set('{cat_id}', $cat_id);

// Prefix dropdown
$prefixes     = $Forum->getPrefixes($cat_id);
$prefix_opts  = '<option value="0">-- ├Ψnek Se├π --</option>';
$sel_prefix   = isset($_POST['prefix_id']) ? intval($_POST['prefix_id']) : 0;
if($prefixes) {
    foreach($prefixes as $pf) {
        $selected    = ($sel_prefix == $pf['id']) ? ' selected' : '';
        $prefix_opts .= '<option value="' . intval($pf['id']) . '"' . $selected . '>'
                      . htmlspecialchars($pf['title']) . '</option>';
    }
}
$tpl->set('{prefix_options}', count($prefixes ?? []) > 0 ? $prefix_opts : '');

// Etiket input
$tags_val = isset($_POST['tags']) ? htmlspecialchars(trim($_POST['tags'])) : '';
$tpl->set('{tags_value}', $tags_val);

// Konu a├π─▒klamas─▒
$desc_val = isset($_POST['description']) ? htmlspecialchars(trim($_POST['description'])) : '';
$tpl->set('{description_value}', $desc_val);

// D├εZELTME: Hata olursa TinyMCE i├πeri─θi geri y├╝kleniyor
if($error && $config['allow_comments_wysiwyg'] == 1) {
    $safe_text_js = json_encode($content, JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE);
    $editor_html .= "<script>document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded',function(){var i=setInterval(function(){if(typeof tinymce!='undefined'&&tinymce.get('comments')&&tinymce.get('comments').initialized){tinymce.get('comments').setContent({$safe_text_js});clearInterval(i);}},200);});</script>";
}


 $tpl->set('{editor}', $editor_html);
 $tpl->set('{title_val}', $post_title_val);
 $tpl->set('{csrf_token}', $Forum->csrfToken());
 $tpl->set('{breadcrumb}', $Forum->getBreadcrumb($cat_id, 0, fl('forum_new_topic_btn')));
 $tpl->set('{SITEURL}', $config['http_home_url']);

if($error) {
    $tpl->set('[error]', ''); $tpl->set('[/error]', '');
    $tpl->set('{error}', $error);
} else {
    $tpl->set_block("'\\[error\\](.*?)\\[/error\\]'is", "");
}

 $tpl->compile('content'); 
 $tpl->clear();

define('KSEARCH', false);
define('RSSPARSE', false);
 $metatags['title'] = fl('forum_new_topic_btn') . ': ' . htmlspecialchars($cat['name']) . ' - ' . $config['home_title'];
?>

db = $db; $this->user = $user; $this->config = $config; } /** * Dinamik ve dile duyarl─▒ Breadcrumb (Ekmek K─▒r─▒nt─▒s─▒) olu┼θturur * @param int $cat_id Kategori ID (iste─θe ba─θl─▒) * @param int $topic_id Konu ID (iste─θe ba─θl─▒) * @param string $custom ├Ψzel ba┼θl─▒k (iste─θe ba─θl─▒) * @return string HTML Breadcrumb */ public function getBreadcrumb($cat_id = 0, $topic_id = 0, $custom = '') { $parts = []; // 1. Ana Sayfa (DLE Ana Sayfas─▒) - Dinamik Metin $home_text = fl('forum_home', 'Ana Sayfa'); $parts[] = '' . $home_text . ''; // 2. Forum Ana Sayfas─▒ $parts[] = '' . fl('forum_forum') . ''; // 3. Kategori Hiyerar┼θisi (Loop Safety: $safety < 20) if ($cat_id > 0) { $current_cat_id = intval($cat_id); $cat_path = []; $safety = 0; while ($current_cat_id > 0 && $safety < 20) { $safety++; $cat = $this->getCatById($current_cat_id); if (!$cat) break; array_unshift($cat_path, '' . htmlspecialchars($cat['name']) . ''); $current_cat_id = intval($cat['parent_id']); } $parts = array_merge($parts, $cat_path); } // 4. Konu Ba┼θl─▒─θ─▒ veya ├Ψzel Sayfa Ba┼θl─▒─θ─▒ if ($topic_id > 0) { $topic = $this->getTopicById($topic_id); if ($topic) { $parts[] = '' . htmlspecialchars($topic['title']) . ''; } } elseif ($custom) { $parts[] = '' . htmlspecialchars($custom) . ''; } $sep = ''; return '
' . implode($sep, $parts) . '
'; } public function makeSlug($title) { return totranslit($title, true, false); } public function isLogged() { return !empty($this->user['user_id']); } /** * Geli┼θmi┼θ flood kontrol├╝: user-based + IP-based + saatlik rate limit */ private function getForumSetting($key, $default = null) { return $this->getSetting($key) ?? $default; } public function checkFloodPublic($action, $wait_seconds = 30) { if (!method_exists($this, 'checkFlood')) { return false; } return $this->checkFlood($action, $wait_seconds); } private function checkFlood($action, $wait_seconds = 30) { $user_id = $this->getUserId(); $ip = $this->db->safesql($_SERVER['REMOTE_ADDR'] ?? '0.0.0.0'); $now = time(); // 1. Kullan─▒c─▒ bazl─▒ flood kontrol├╝ (Integer t─▒rnaklar─▒ kald─▒r─▒ld─▒) $row = $this->db->super_query( "SELECT last_action, count, blocked_until FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_flood WHERE user_id=$user_id AND action='$action' LIMIT 1" ); if($row) { // Blok s├╝resi dolmad─▒ysa reddet if(intval($row['blocked_until']) > $now) { $remaining = intval($row['blocked_until']) - $now; return ['error' => fl('err_flood_post', $remaining)]; } // Flood s├╝resi i├πindeyse say if(($now - intval($row['last_action'])) < $wait_seconds) { $count = intval($row['count']) + 1; // 5 kez flood έΗΤ 10 dakika blok $blocked = ($count >= 5) ? ($now + 600) : 0; $this->db->query( "UPDATE " . PREFIX . "_forum_flood SET last_action='$now', count='$count', blocked_until='$blocked' WHERE user_id='$user_id' AND action='$action'" ); if($blocked) { return ['error' => fl('err_flood_blocked')]; } $wait = $wait_seconds - ($now - intval($row['last_action'])); return ['error' => fl('err_flood_post', $wait)]; } // Normal g├╝ncelle $this->db->query( "UPDATE " . PREFIX . "_forum_flood SET last_action='$now', count='1', blocked_until='0' WHERE user_id='$user_id' AND action='$action'" ); } else { $this->db->query( "INSERT INTO " . PREFIX . "_forum_flood (user_id, ip, action, last_action, count, blocked_until) VALUES ('$user_id', '$ip', '$action', '$now', '1', '0')" ); } // 2. IP bazl─▒ saatlik rate limit $ip_count = $this->db->super_query( "SELECT COUNT(*) as c FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_flood WHERE ip='$ip' AND action='$action' AND last_action > " . ($now - 3600) ); $hourly_limit = intval($this->getForumSetting('flood_max_per_hour') ?? 30); if($ip_count && intval($ip_count['c']) > $hourly_limit) { return ['error' => fl('err_flood_ip')]; } return true; } public function getUserId() { return intval($this->user['user_id']); } /** * ├Θevrimi├πi istatistikleri - Cache'li (5 dk), tek sorgulu * {prefix}_session tablosu: member_id > 0 = ├╝ye, member_id = 0 = misafir * * @return array ['total' => int, 'members' => int, 'guests' => int, 'timestamp' => int] */ public function getOnlineStats() { $cacheKey = "forum_online_stats"; $cached = dle_cache($cacheKey, $this->config['skin']); if ($cached) { $data = unserialize($cached); if (is_array($data) && isset($data['timestamp']) && (time() - intval($data['timestamp'])) < 300) { return $data; } } $online_time = time() - intval($this->config['online_time'] ?? 300); // DLE Native: grup 1-4 = kay─▒tl─▒ ├╝ye, grup 5 = misafir/onaydaki ├╝ye $members = $this->db->super_query( "SELECT COUNT(*) as c FROM " . USERPREFIX . "_users WHERE lastdate > '$online_time' AND user_group >= 1 AND user_group <= 4" ); $guests = $this->db->super_query( "SELECT COUNT(*) as c FROM " . USERPREFIX . "_users WHERE lastdate > '$online_time' AND user_group = 5" ); $members_count = intval($members['c'] ?? 0); $guests_count = intval($guests['c'] ?? 0); $stats = [ 'total' => $members_count + $guests_count, 'members' => $members_count, 'guests' => $guests_count, 'timestamp' => time() ]; create_cache($cacheKey, serialize($stats), $this->config['skin']); return $stats; } /** * Ziyaret├πiyi logla - 15 dakika interval kontrol├╝ * Sadece forum sayfalar─▒nda ├πa─θr─▒l─▒r */ public function logVisitor() { $user_id = $this->getUserId(); $ip = $this->db->safesql($_SERVER['REMOTE_ADDR'] ?? '0.0.0.0'); $page = $this->db->safesql($_SERVER['REQUEST_URI'] ?? ''); // Ayn─▒ IP'den son 15 dakikada kay─▒t varsa tekrar ekleme $exists = $this->db->super_query( "SELECT id FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_visitors WHERE ip = '$ip' AND date > NOW() - INTERVAL 15 MINUTE LIMIT 1" ); if (!$exists) { $this->db->query( "INSERT INTO " . PREFIX . "_forum_visitors (user_id, ip, page, date) VALUES ('$user_id', '$ip', '$page', NOW())" ); } } /** * Bug├╝nk├╝ tekil ziyaret├πi say─▒s─▒ - Cache'li (1 saat) * * @return array ['total_visitors' => int, 'members' => int, 'guests' => int, 'timestamp' => int] */ public function getTodayVisitors() { $cacheKey = "forum_today_visitors"; $cached = dle_cache($cacheKey, $this->config['skin']); if ($cached) { $data = unserialize($cached); if (is_array($data) && isset($data['timestamp']) && (time() - intval($data['timestamp'])) < 3600) { return $data; } } // Tek sorguda: toplam tekil IP, tekil ├╝ye, tekil misafir $row = $this->db->super_query( "SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT ip) as total_visitors, COUNT(DISTINCT IF(user_id > 0, user_id, NULL)) as members, COUNT(DISTINCT IF(user_id = 0, ip, NULL)) as guests FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_visitors WHERE date >= CURDATE()" ); $stats = [ 'total_visitors' => intval($row['total_visitors'] ?? 0), 'members' => intval($row['members'] ?? 0), 'guests' => intval($row['guests'] ?? 0), 'timestamp' => time() ]; create_cache($cacheKey, serialize($stats), $this->config['skin']); return $stats; } public function getOnlineCount() { $time = time() - 300; $r = $this->db->super_query("SELECT COUNT(*) as c FROM " . USERPREFIX . "_users WHERE lastdate > '$time'"); return intval($r['c']); } public function canDo($perm, $cat_id = 0) { $group = intval($this->user['user_group']); $user_id = $this->getUserId(); // S├╝per admin her ┼θeyi yapabilir if($group == 1) return true; // Kategori bazl─▒ rol kontrol├╝ (Integer t─▒rnaklar─▒ kald─▒r─▒ld─▒) if($cat_id > 0 && $user_id > 0) { $cat_id = intval($cat_id); $role_row = $this->db->super_query( "SELECT role FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_roles WHERE cat_id=$cat_id AND user_id=$user_id LIMIT 1" ); if($role_row) { $role = $role_row['role']; if($role === 'banned') return false; if($role === 'admin' || $role === 'moderator') { // Moderat├╢r izinleri $mod_perms = ['moderate','lock_topic','pin_topic','delete_any','reply_topic','edit_own','delete_own','view_forum']; if(in_array($perm, $mod_perms)) return true; } } } // Kategori gizlilik kontrol├╝ if($cat_id > 0 && $perm === 'view_forum') { $cat = $this->db->super_query( "SELECT is_private, read_groups, permissions FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_cats WHERE id='$cat_id' LIMIT 1" ); if($cat && intval($cat['is_private']) === 1) { // ├Ψzel kategori - read_groups kontrol $allowed_groups = array_filter(array_map('intval', explode(',', $cat['read_groups']))); if(!empty($allowed_groups) && !in_array($group, $allowed_groups)) { return false; } } } // Yazma izni i├πin write_groups kontrol├╝ if($cat_id > 0 && in_array($perm, ['create_topic','reply_topic'])) { $cat = $this->db->super_query( "SELECT is_private, write_groups FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_cats WHERE id='$cat_id' LIMIT 1" ); if($cat && !empty($cat['write_groups'])) { $write_groups = array_filter(array_map('intval', explode(',', $cat['write_groups']))); if(!empty($write_groups) && !in_array($group, $write_groups)) { return false; } } } // Standart DLE grup bazl─▒ izinler $allowed = [ 'view_forum' => [1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7], 'create_topic' => [1, 2, 3, 4, 5], 'reply_topic' => [1, 2, 3, 4, 5], 'edit_own' => [1, 2, 3, 4, 5], 'delete_own' => [1, 2, 3, 4, 5], 'moderate' => [1, 2], 'send_pm' => [1, 2, 3, 4, 5], 'lock_topic' => [1, 2], 'pin_topic' => [1, 2], 'delete_any' => [1, 2], ]; return isset($allowed[$perm]) && in_array($group, $allowed[$perm]); } public function csrfToken() { global $dle_login_hash; return $dle_login_hash; } public function verifyCsrf($token) { global $dle_login_hash; if(empty($token) || empty($dle_login_hash)) return false; return hash_equals((string)$dle_login_hash, (string)$token); } public function getSetting($name) { $row = $this->db->super_query("SELECT value FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_settings WHERE name = '" . $this->db->safesql($name) . "'"); return $row ? $row['value'] : null; } public function getCats($parent_id = 0) { $cacheKey = "forum_cats_" . intval($parent_id); $cached = dle_cache($cacheKey, $this->config['skin']); if($cached) return unserialize($cached); $pid = intval($parent_id); $cats = $this->db->super_query( "SELECT * FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_cats WHERE parent_id = '$pid' ORDER BY posi ASC", true ); create_cache($cacheKey, serialize($cats), $this->config['skin']); return $cats; } public function getCatBySlug($slug) { $slug = $this->db->safesql($slug); return $this->db->super_query("SELECT * FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_cats WHERE alt_name = '$slug'"); } public function getCatById($id) { $id = intval($id); return $this->db->super_query("SELECT * FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_cats WHERE id = '$id'"); } public function updateCatStats($cat_id) { $cat_id = intval($cat_id); $tc = $this->db->super_query("SELECT COUNT(*) as c FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_topics WHERE cat_id = '$cat_id' AND is_deleted = '0'"); // D├εZELTME: t.is_deleted = '0' ┼θart─▒ eklendi $pc = $this->db->super_query("SELECT COUNT(*) as c FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_posts p JOIN " . PREFIX . "_forum_topics t ON t.id = p.topic_id WHERE t.cat_id = '$cat_id' AND p.is_deleted = '0' AND t.is_deleted = '0'"); $last = $this->db->super_query("SELECT id FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_topics WHERE cat_id = '$cat_id' AND is_deleted = '0' ORDER BY last_post_date DESC LIMIT 1"); $last_id = $last ? $last['id'] : 0; $this->db->query("UPDATE " . PREFIX . "_forum_cats SET topic_count = '{$tc['c']}', post_count = '{$pc['c']}', last_topic_id = '$last_id' WHERE id = '$cat_id'"); clear_cache("forum_cats_0"); clear_cache("forum_cats_" . $cat_id); } public function getTopics($cat_id, $page = 1, $per_page = 25) { $cat_id = intval($cat_id); $per_page = intval($per_page); $offset = (max(1, intval($page)) - 1) * $per_page; return $this->db->super_query( "SELECT t.*, u.name as username, u.foto as avatar, lp.date as lp_date, lu.name as last_username, lu.foto as last_user_avatar FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_topics t LEFT JOIN " . USERPREFIX . "_users u ON u.user_id = t.user_id LEFT JOIN " . PREFIX . "_forum_posts lp ON lp.id = t.last_post_id LEFT JOIN " . USERPREFIX . "_users lu ON lu.user_id = t.last_user_id WHERE t.cat_id = '$cat_id' AND t.is_deleted = '0' ORDER BY t.is_pinned DESC, t.last_post_date DESC LIMIT $offset, $per_page", true ); } public function countTopics($cat_id) { $cat_id = intval($cat_id); $r = $this->db->super_query("SELECT COUNT(*) as c FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_topics WHERE cat_id = '$cat_id' AND is_deleted = '0'"); return intval($r['c']); } public function searchTopics($query, $page = 1, $per_page = 25) { // Boolean mode operator injection ├╢nleme $query = trim($query); $query = preg_replace('/[+\-><\(\)~*"@]+/', ' ', $query); $query = preg_replace('/\s+/', ' ', $query); $query = $this->db->safesql($query); $per_page = intval($per_page); $offset = (max(1, intval($page)) - 1) * $per_page; return $this->db->super_query( "SELECT t.*, u.name as username, u.foto as avatar, lp.date as lp_date, lu.name as last_username, lu.foto as last_user_avatar, c.alt_name as cat_slug FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_topics t LEFT JOIN " . USERPREFIX . "_users u ON u.user_id = t.user_id LEFT JOIN " . PREFIX . "_forum_posts lp ON lp.id = t.last_post_id LEFT JOIN " . USERPREFIX . "_users lu ON lu.user_id = t.last_user_id LEFT JOIN " . PREFIX . "_forum_cats c ON c.id = t.cat_id WHERE MATCH(t.title) AGAINST('$query' IN BOOLEAN MODE) AND t.is_deleted = '0' ORDER BY t.last_post_date DESC LIMIT $offset, $per_page", true ); } public function countSearchTopics($query) { // Boolean mode operator injection ├╢nleme $query = trim($query); $query = preg_replace('/[+\-><\(\)~*"@]+/', ' ', $query); $query = preg_replace('/\s+/', ' ', $query); $query = $this->db->safesql($query); $r = $this->db->super_query("SELECT COUNT(*) as c FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_topics t WHERE MATCH(t.title) AGAINST('$query' IN BOOLEAN MODE) AND t.is_deleted = '0'"); return intval($r['c']); } public function getTopicBySlug($slug) { $slug = $this->db->safesql($slug); return $this->db->super_query( "SELECT t.*, u.name as username, u.foto as avatar, c.name as cat_name, c.alt_name as cat_slug FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_topics t LEFT JOIN " . USERPREFIX . "_users u ON u.user_id = t.user_id LEFT JOIN " . PREFIX . "_forum_cats c ON c.id = t.cat_id WHERE t.alt_name = '$slug' AND t.is_deleted = '0'" ); } public function getTopicById($id) { $id = intval($id); return $this->db->super_query( "SELECT t.*, u.name as username, u.foto as avatar, c.name as cat_name, c.alt_name as cat_slug, lu.name as last_username, lu.foto as last_user_avatar FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_topics t LEFT JOIN " . USERPREFIX . "_users u ON u.user_id = t.user_id LEFT JOIN " . USERPREFIX . "_users lu ON lu.user_id = t.last_user_id LEFT JOIN " . PREFIX . "_forum_cats c ON c.id = t.cat_id WHERE t.id = '$id' AND t.is_deleted = '0'" ); } public function createTopic($cat_id, $title, $text, $description = '') { if(!$this->isLogged()) return ['error' => fl('forum_err_must_login')]; if(!$this->canDo('create_topic')) return ['error' => fl('forum_err_no_permission')]; $cat_id = intval($cat_id); $title = trim($title); $text = trim($text); $user_id = $this->getUserId(); if(mb_strlen($title) < 3) return ['error' => fl('forum_err_title_short')]; if(mb_strlen($title) > 255) return ['error' => fl('forum_err_title_long')]; $clean_text = trim(strip_tags(html_entity_decode($text, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'))); if(mb_strlen($clean_text) < 10) return ['error' => fl('forum_err_post_short')]; $flood_time = intval($this->getForumSetting('flood_time') ?: 30); $flood_result = $this->checkFlood('topic', $flood_time); if($flood_result !== true) return $flood_result; // D├εZELTME: Slug HAM metinden al─▒n─▒yor $slug = $this->makeSlug($title); $exists = $this->db->super_query("SELECT id FROM " . PREFIX . PREFIX . "_forum_topics (cat_id, title, alt_name, description, user_id, date, last_post_date) VALUES ('$cat_id', '$title_db', '$slug', '$desc_db', '$user_id', NOW(), NOW())"); $topic_id = $this->db->insert_id(); $this->db->query("INSERT INTO " . PREFIX . "_forum_posts (topic_id, user_id, text, ip, date) VALUES ('$topic_id', '$user_id', '$text_db', '$ip', NOW())"); $post_id = $this->db->insert_id(); $this->db->query("UPDATE " . PREFIX . "_forum_topics SET last_post_id = '$post_id', last_user_id = '$user_id' WHERE id = '$topic_id'"); $this->addPoints($user_id, intval($this->getSetting('points_new_topic') ?: 10)); $this->updatePostCount($user_id); $this->updateCatStats($cat_id); clear_cache("forum_topics_" . $cat_id); // D├εZELTME: Mentionlar HAM text ├╝zerinden aranmal─▒ $this->parseMentions($text, $topic_id, $post_id); return ['success' => true, 'topic_id' => $topic_id, 'slug' => $slug]; } public function lockTopic($topic_id, $state = 1) { if(!$this->canDo('lock_topic')) return false; $topic_id = intval($topic_id); $state = $state ? 1 : 0; $this->db->query("UPDATE " . 'lock_topic' : 'unlock_topic', $topic_id); return true; } public function pinTopic($topic_id, $state = 1) { if(!$this->canDo('pin_topic')) return false; $topic_id = intval($topic_id); $state = $state ? 1 : 0; $this->db->query("UPDATE " . 'pin_topic' : 'unpin_topic', $topic_id); return true; } public function deleteTopic($topic_id) { if(!$this->canDo('delete_any')) return false; $topic_id = intval($topic_id); $topic = $this->getTopicById($topic_id); if(!$topic) return false; // D├εZELTME: Konuyla birlikte mesajlar da siliniyor $this->db->query("UPDATE " . "_forum_topics SET views = views + 1 WHERE id = '$topic_id'"); create_cache($cacheKey, '1', $this->config['skin']); } } public function getPosts($topic_id, $page = 1, $per_page = 20) { $topic_id = intval($topic_id); $per_page = intval($per_page); $offset = (max(1, intval($page)) - 1) * $per_page; return $this->db->super_query( "SELECT p.*, u.name as username, u.foto as avatar, u.user_group, u.reg_date, u.forum_points, u.forum_post_count, u.forum_rank_id, r.title as rank_title, r.color as rank_color, r.icon as rank_icon FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_posts p LEFT JOIN " . USERPREFIX . "_users u ON u.user_id = p.user_id LEFT JOIN " . PREFIX . "_forum_ranks r ON r.id = u.forum_rank_id WHERE p.topic_id = '$topic_id' AND p.is_deleted = '0' AND p.is_approved = '1' ORDER BY p.date ASC LIMIT $offset, $per_page", true ); } public function countPosts($topic_id) { $topic_id = intval($topic_id); $r = $this->db->super_query("SELECT COUNT(*) as c FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_posts WHERE topic_id = '$topic_id' AND is_deleted = '0'"); return intval($r['c']); } public function addReply($topic_id, $text) { if(!$this->isLogged()) return ['error' => fl('forum_err_must_login')]; if(!$this->canDo('reply_topic')) return ['error' => fl('forum_err_no_permission')]; $topic_id = intval($topic_id); $topic = $this->getTopicById($topic_id); if(!$topic) return ['error' => fl('forum_err_topic_not_found')]; if($topic['is_locked'] && !$this->canDo('moderate')) return ['error' => fl('forum_err_topic_locked')]; $text = trim($text); $user_id = $this->getUserId(); $minLen = intval($this->getSetting('min_post_length') ?: 10); // D├εZELTME: Uzunluk kontrol├╝ HAM metinde yap─▒lmal─▒ if(mb_strlen(strip_tags(html_entity_decode($text, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'))) < $minLen) return ['error' => sprintf(fl('forum_err_post_min'), $minLen)]; $flood_time = intval($this->getForumSetting('flood_time') ?: 30); $flood_result = $this->checkFlood('reply', $flood_time); if($flood_result !== true) return $flood_result; $text_safe = $this->db->safesql($text); $ip = $this->db->safesql($_SERVER['REMOTE_ADDR']); $is_approved = $this->needsApproval($user_id) ? 0 : 1; $this->db->query("INSERT INTO " . PREFIX . "_forum_posts (topic_id, user_id, text, ip, date, is_approved) VALUES ('$topic_id', '$user_id', '$text_safe', '$ip', NOW(), '$is_approved')"); $post_id = $this->db->insert_id(); if(!$is_approved) return ['success' => true, 'post_id' => $post_id, 'pending' => true, 'message' => fl('forum_ok_approval_pending')]; $this->db->query("UPDATE " . PREFIX . "_forum_topics SET replies = replies + 1, last_post_id = '$post_id', last_user_id = '$user_id', last_post_date = NOW() WHERE id = '$topic_id'"); $this->updateCatStats($topic['cat_id']); $this->addPoints($user_id, intval($this->getSetting('points_new_reply') ?: 2)); $this->updatePostCount($user_id); $this->updateUserRank($user_id); $subs = $this->db->super_query("SELECT user_id FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_subs WHERE topic_id = '$topic_id'", true); foreach($subs as $sub) { $this->sendNotif($sub['user_id'], 'reply', $topic_id, $post_id); } $this->sendNotif($topic['user_id'], 'reply', $topic_id, $post_id); $this->parseMentions($text, $topic_id, $post_id); clear_cache("forum_topics_" . $topic['cat_id']); return ['success' => true, 'post_id' => $post_id]; } public function editPost($post_id, $new_text) { if(!$this->isLogged()) return ['error' => fl('forum_err_must_login')]; $post_id = intval($post_id); $post = $this->db->super_query("SELECT * FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_posts WHERE id = '$post_id' AND is_deleted = '0'"); if(!$post) return ['error' => fl('forum_err_post_not_found')]; $own = $post['user_id'] == $this->getUserId(); if(!$own && !$this->canDo('moderate')) return ['error' => fl('forum_err_no_permission')]; $new_text = trim($new_text); if(mb_strlen(strip_tags(html_entity_decode($new_text, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'))) < 10) return ['error' => fl('forum_err_post_short')]; // KR─░T─░K D├εZELTME: Eski metin DB'den ham gelse bile, yeni bir INSERT sorgusuna // g├╢m├╝lece─θi i├πin MUTLAKA tekrar safesql ile escape edilmelidir. Aksi SQL syntax error verir. $old_text_safe = $this->db->safesql($post['text']); $this->db->query("INSERT INTO " . PREFIX . "_forum_edit_history (post_id, editor_id, old_text, date) VALUES ('$post_id', '" . $this->getUserId() . "', '$old_text_safe', NOW())"); $new_text_safe = $this->db->safesql($new_text); $this->db->query("UPDATE " . PREFIX . "_forum_posts SET text = '$new_text_safe', updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = '$post_id'"); if($own) $this->logAction('edit_own_post', $post['topic_id'], $post_id); else $this->logAction('edit_post_as_mod', $post['topic_id'], $post_id); clear_cache('forum_sticky_' . $post['topic_id']); return ['success' => true]; } public function deletePost($post_id) { if(!$this->isLogged()) return ['error' => fl('forum_err_must_login')]; $post_id = intval($post_id); $post = $this->db->super_query("SELECT * FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_posts WHERE id = '$post_id' AND is_deleted = '0'"); if(!$post) return ['error' => fl('forum_err_post_not_found')]; $own = $post['user_id'] == $this->getUserId(); if(!$own && !$this->canDo('moderate')) return ['error' => fl('forum_err_no_permission')]; $topic_id = intval($post['topic_id']); $topic = $this->getTopicById($topic_id); $this->db->query("UPDATE " . PREFIX . "_forum_posts SET is_deleted = '1' WHERE id = '$post_id'"); $this->db->query("UPDATE " . PREFIX . "_forum_topics SET replies = GREATEST(replies - 1, 0) WHERE id = '$topic_id'"); if($topic && $topic['last_post_id'] == $post_id) { $new_last = $this->db->super_query("SELECT id, user_id, date FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_posts WHERE topic_id='$topic_id' AND is_deleted='0' ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1"); if($new_last) { $this->db->query("UPDATE " . PREFIX . "_forum_topics SET last_post_id='{$new_last['id']}', last_user_id='{$new_last['user_id']}', last_post_date='{$new_last['date']}' WHERE id='$topic_id'"); } else { $this->db->query("UPDATE " . PREFIX . "_forum_topics SET last_post_id='0', last_user_id='0', last_post_date=NOW() WHERE id='$topic_id'"); } $this->updateCatStats($topic['cat_id']); } $this->logAction('delete_post', $topic_id, $post_id); clear_cache('forum_sticky_' . $topic_id); return ['success' => true]; } public function toggleLike($post_id, $type = 'like') { if(!$this->isLogged()) return ['error' => fl('forum_err_must_login')]; $post_id = intval($post_id); $type = ($type === 'dislike') ? 'dislike' : 'like'; $user_id = $this->getUserId(); // Like flood korumas─▒ $flood_result = $this->checkFlood('like', 2); if($flood_result !== true) return $flood_result; $post = $this->db->super_query("SELECT user_id, topic_id, likes, dislikes FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_posts WHERE id = '$post_id' AND is_deleted = '0'"); if(!$post) return ['error' => fl('forum_err_post_not_found')]; if($post['user_id'] == $user_id) return ['error' => fl('forum_err_own_like')]; $check = $this->db->super_query("SELECT id, type FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_likes WHERE post_id = '$post_id' AND user_id = '$user_id'"); if($check) { if($check['type'] === $type) { $this->db->query("DELETE FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_likes WHERE id = '{$check['id']}'"); $field = ($type === 'like') ? 'likes' : 'dislikes'; $this->db->query("UPDATE " . PREFIX . "_forum_posts SET $field = GREATEST($field - 1, 0) WHERE id = '$post_id'"); $counts = $this->db->super_query("SELECT likes, dislikes FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_posts WHERE id = '$post_id'"); return ['status' => 'removed', 'type' => $type, 'likes' => intval($counts['likes']), 'dislikes' => intval($counts['dislikes'])]; } else { $this->db->query("UPDATE " . PREFIX . "_forum_likes SET type = '$type' WHERE id = '{$check['id']}'"); if($type === 'like') { $this->db->query("UPDATE " . PREFIX . "_forum_posts SET likes = likes + 1, dislikes = GREATEST(dislikes - 1, 0) WHERE id = '$post_id'"); } else { $this->db->query("UPDATE " . PREFIX . "_forum_posts SET dislikes = dislikes + 1, likes = GREATEST(likes - 1, 0) WHERE id = '$post_id'"); } $counts = $this->db->super_query("SELECT likes, dislikes FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_posts WHERE id = '$post_id'"); $status = ($type === 'like') ? 'liked' : 'disliked'; return ['status' => $status, 'type' => $type, 'likes' => intval($counts['likes']), 'dislikes' => intval($counts['dislikes'])]; } } else { $this->db->query("INSERT INTO " . PREFIX . "_forum_likes (post_id, user_id, type, date) VALUES ('$post_id', '$user_id', '$type', NOW())"); if($type === 'like') { $this->db->query("UPDATE " . PREFIX . "_forum_posts SET likes = likes + 1 WHERE id = '$post_id'"); $this->addPoints($post['user_id'], intval($this->getSetting('points_received_like') ?: 5)); $this->sendNotif($post['user_id'], 'like', $post['topic_id'], $post_id); $this->updateUserRank($post['user_id']); } else { $this->db->query("UPDATE " . PREFIX . "_forum_posts SET dislikes = dislikes + 1 WHERE id = '$post_id'"); } $counts = $this->db->super_query("SELECT likes, dislikes FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_posts WHERE id = '$post_id'"); $status = ($type === 'like') ? 'liked' : 'disliked'; return ['status' => $status, 'type' => $type, 'likes' => intval($counts['likes']), 'dislikes' => intval($counts['dislikes'])]; } } public function toggleFollow($topic_id) { if(!$this->isLogged()) return ['error' => fl('forum_err_must_login')]; $topic_id = intval($topic_id); $user_id = $this->getUserId(); $check = $this->db->super_query("SELECT id FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_subs WHERE topic_id = '$topic_id' AND user_id = '$user_id'"); if($check) { $this->db->query("DELETE FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_subs WHERE id = '{$check['id']}'"); return ['status' => 'unfollowed']; } else { $this->db->query("INSERT INTO " . PREFIX . "_forum_subs (topic_id, user_id, date) VALUES ('$topic_id', '$user_id', NOW())"); return ['status' => 'followed']; } } public function isFollowing($topic_id) { if(!$this->isLogged()) return false; $topic_id = intval($topic_id); $user_id = $this->getUserId(); return (bool)$this->db->super_query("SELECT id FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_subs WHERE topic_id = '$topic_id' AND user_id = '$user_id'"); } public function sendNotif($to_user, $type, $topic_id, $post_id = 0, $extra = []) { $to_user = intval($to_user); $from_user = $this->getUserId(); if($to_user == $from_user || $to_user <= 0) return; $dup = $this->db->super_query("SELECT id FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_notifs WHERE user_id = '$to_user' AND from_user = '$from_user' AND type = '" . $this->db->safesql($type) . "' AND topic_id = '" . intval($topic_id) . "' AND date > NOW() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR"); if($dup) return; // JSON payload - geni┼θletilebilir bildirim verisi $payload_data = [ 'type' => $type, 'topic_id' => intval($topic_id), 'post_id' => intval($post_id), ]; // Ek veri varsa payload'a ekle (quote, mention, system) if(isset($extra) && is_array($extra)) { $payload_data = array_merge($payload_data, $extra); } $payload_json = $this->db->safesql(json_encode($payload_data, JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE)); $this->db->query("INSERT INTO " . PREFIX . "_forum_notifs (user_id, from_user, type, topic_id, post_id, payload, date) VALUES ('$to_user', '$from_user', '" . $this->db->safesql($type) . "', '" . intval($topic_id) . "', '" . intval($post_id) . "', '$payload_json', NOW())"); } public function notifyQuote($to_user, $topic_id, $post_id, $quote_preview = '') { $this->sendNotif($to_user, 'quote', $topic_id, $post_id, [ 'preview' => mb_substr(strip_tags($quote_preview), 0, 100), ]); } public function notifyMention($to_user, $topic_id, $post_id) { $this->sendNotif($to_user, 'mention', $topic_id, $post_id); } public function notifySystem($to_user, $message, $link = '') { $from_user = 0; $to_user = intval($to_user); if($to_user <= 0) return; $payload_json = $this->db->safesql(json_encode([ 'type' => 'system', 'message' => mb_substr($message, 0, 255), 'link' => $link, ], JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE)); $this->db->query( "INSERT INTO " . PREFIX . "_forum_notifs (user_id, from_user, type, topic_id, post_id, payload, date) VALUES ('$to_user', '0', 'system', '0', '0', '$payload_json', NOW())" ); } public function getNotifs($user_id = null, $limit = 10) { $uid = $user_id ? intval($user_id) : $this->getUserId(); return $this->db->super_query( "SELECT n.*, u.name as from_name, t.title as topic_title FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_notifs n LEFT JOIN " . USERPREFIX . "_users u ON u.user_id = n.from_user LEFT JOIN " . PREFIX . "_forum_topics t ON t.id = n.topic_id WHERE n.user_id = '$uid' ORDER BY n.date DESC LIMIT " . intval($limit), true ); } public function countUnreadNotifs() { if(!$this->isLogged()) return 0; $uid = $this->getUserId(); $r = $this->db->super_query("SELECT COUNT(*) as c FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_notifs WHERE user_id = '$uid' AND is_read = '0'"); return intval($r['c']); } public function markNotifsRead() { $uid = $this->getUserId(); $this->db->query("UPDATE " . PREFIX . "_forum_notifs SET is_read = '1' WHERE user_id = '$uid'"); } public function markRead($topic_id, $post_id) { if(!$this->isLogged()) return; $topic_id = intval($topic_id); $post_id = intval($post_id); $user_id = $this->getUserId(); // Integer de─θerler i├πin t─▒rnaklar kald─▒r─▒ld─▒ $exists = $this->db->super_query("SELECT id FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_readlog WHERE user_id = $user_id AND topic_id = $topic_id"); if($exists) { $exists_id = intval($exists['id']); $this->db->query("UPDATE " . PREFIX . "_forum_readlog SET last_read_post = $post_id, date = NOW() WHERE id = $exists_id"); } else { $this->db->query("INSERT INTO " . PREFIX . "_forum_readlog (user_id, topic_id, last_read_post, date) VALUES ($user_id, $topic_id, $post_id, NOW())"); } } public function isUnread($topic_id, $last_post_id) { if(!$this->isLogged()) return false; $topic_id = intval($topic_id); $user_id = $this->getUserId(); // Integer optimizasyonu yap─▒ld─▒ $log = $this->db->super_query("SELECT last_read_post FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_readlog WHERE user_id = $user_id AND topic_id = $topic_id"); if(!$log) return true; return intval($log['last_read_post']) < intval($last_post_id); } public function markAsRead($topic_id, $last_post_id) { if(!$this->isLogged()) return; $topic_id = intval($topic_id); $last_post_id = intval($last_post_id); $user_id = $this->getUserId(); $now = date('Y-m-d H:i:s'); $this->db->query( "INSERT INTO " . PREFIX . "_forum_readlog (user_id, topic_id, last_read_post, date) VALUES ('$user_id', '$topic_id', '$last_post_id', '$now') ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE last_read_post='$last_post_id', date='$now'" ); } public function markCatAsRead($cat_id) { if(!$this->isLogged()) return; $cat_id = intval($cat_id); $user_id = $this->getUserId(); $now = date('Y-m-d H:i:s'); // Kategorideki t├╝m konular─▒ okunmu┼θ say $topics = $this->db->super_query( "SELECT id, last_post_id FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_topics WHERE cat_id='$cat_id' AND is_deleted='0'", true ); if($topics) { foreach($topics as $t) { $tid = intval($t['id']); $lpid = intval($t['last_post_id']); $this->db->query( "INSERT INTO " . PREFIX . "_forum_readlog (user_id, topic_id, last_read_post, date) VALUES ('$user_id', '$tid', '$lpid', '$now') ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE last_read_post='$lpid', date='$now'" ); } } } public function cleanReadLog($days = 30) { $days = intval($days); $this->db->query( "DELETE FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_readlog WHERE date < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL $days DAY)" ); } // === PREFIX FONKSIYONLARI === public function getPrefixes($cat_id = 0) { $where = $cat_id > 0 ? "WHERE cat_id='" . intval($cat_id) . "' OR cat_id='0'" : ""; return $this->db->super_query( "SELECT * FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_prefixes $where ORDER BY posi ASC, id ASC", true ); } public function getPrefixById($prefix_id) { $prefix_id = intval($prefix_id); if($prefix_id <= 0) return null; return $this->db->super_query( "SELECT * FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_prefixes WHERE id='$prefix_id' LIMIT 1" ); } public function formatPrefix($prefix) { if(!$prefix) return ''; $title = htmlspecialchars($prefix['title'], ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); $color = preg_replace('/[^a-zA-Z0-9#]/', '', $prefix['color']); $bg_color = preg_replace('/[^a-zA-Z0-9#]/', '', $prefix['bg_color']); return "{$title}"; } // === ET─░KET (TAG) FONKSIYONLARI === public function getTopicTags($topic_id) { $topic_id = intval($topic_id); return $this->db->super_query( "SELECT t.* FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_tags t JOIN " . PREFIX . "_forum_topic_tags tt ON tt.tag_id = t.id WHERE tt.topic_id='$topic_id' ORDER BY t.name ASC", true ); } public function setTopicTags($topic_id, $tags_str) { $topic_id = intval($topic_id); if($topic_id <= 0) return; // ├Ψnce eski etiketleri temizle, count'lar─▒ d├╝┼θ├╝r $old_tags = $this->getTopicTags($topic_id); if($old_tags) { foreach($old_tags as $ot) { $this->db->query("UPDATE " . PREFIX . "_forum_tags SET count=GREATEST(0,count-1) WHERE id='" . intval($ot['id']) . "'"); } } $this->db->query("DELETE FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_topic_tags WHERE topic_id='$topic_id'"); if(empty(trim($tags_str))) return; // Yeni etiketleri i┼θle - max 5 etiket, max 30 karakter $raw_tags = array_slice(array_unique(array_map('trim', explode(',', $tags_str))), 0, 5); foreach($raw_tags as $tag_name) { $tag_name = mb_substr(preg_replace('/[^\p{L}\p{N}\s\-]/u', '', $tag_name), 0, 30); if(mb_strlen($tag_name) < 2) continue; $slug = mb_strtolower(str_replace(' ', '-', $tag_name)); $safe_name = $this->db->safesql($tag_name); $safe_slug = $this->db->safesql($slug); // Etiket yoksa olu┼θtur $this->db->query( "INSERT INTO " . PREFIX . "_forum_tags (name, slug, count) VALUES ('$safe_name', '$safe_slug', 1) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE count=count+1, name='$safe_name'" ); $tag_id = $this->db->insert_id(); if(!$tag_id) { $row = $this->db->super_query("SELECT id FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_tags WHERE slug='$safe_slug' LIMIT 1"); $tag_id = $row ? intval($row['id']) : 0; } if($tag_id > 0) { $this->db->query( "INSERT IGNORE INTO " . PREFIX . "_forum_topic_tags (topic_id, tag_id) VALUES ('$topic_id', '$tag_id')" ); } } } public function getTopicsByTag($tag_slug, $page = 1, $per_page = 25) { $tag_slug = $this->db->safesql($tag_slug); $per_page = intval($per_page); $offset = (max(1, intval($page)) - 1) * $per_page; // KR─░T─░K D├εZELTME: c.name as cat_name ve c.alt_name as cat_slug eklendi. // LEFT JOIN _forum_cats eklendi. return $this->db->super_query( "SELECT t.*, u.name as username, u.foto as avatar, c.name as cat_name, c.alt_name as cat_slug FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_topics t JOIN " . PREFIX . "_forum_topic_tags tt ON tt.topic_id = t.id JOIN " . PREFIX . "_forum_tags tg ON tg.id = tt.tag_id LEFT JOIN " . USERPREFIX . "_users u ON u.user_id = t.user_id LEFT JOIN " . PREFIX . "_forum_cats c ON c.id = t.cat_id WHERE tg.slug='$tag_slug' AND t.is_deleted='0' ORDER BY t.last_post_date DESC LIMIT $offset, $per_page", true ); } public function getPopularTags($limit = 20) { $limit = intval($limit); return $this->db->super_query( "SELECT * FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_tags WHERE count > 0 ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT $limit", true ); } // === YANITSIZ / AKT─░F KONULAR === public function getUnansweredTopics($page = 1, $per_page = 25) { $per_page = intval($per_page); $offset = (max(1, intval($page)) - 1) * $per_page; return $this->db->super_query( "SELECT t.*, u.name as username, u.foto as avatar, c.name as cat_name, c.alt_name as cat_slug FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_topics t LEFT JOIN " . USERPREFIX . "_users u ON u.user_id = t.user_id LEFT JOIN " . PREFIX . "_forum_cats c ON c.id = t.cat_id WHERE t.replies='0' AND t.is_deleted='0' AND t.is_locked='0' ORDER BY t.date DESC LIMIT $offset, $per_page", true ); } public function countUnansweredTopics() { $r = $this->db->super_query( "SELECT COUNT(*) as c FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_topics WHERE replies='0' AND is_deleted='0' AND is_locked='0'" ); return intval($r['c']); } public function getActiveTopics($page = 1, $per_page = 25, $days = 7) { $per_page = intval($per_page); $offset = (max(1, intval($page)) - 1) * $per_page; $days = intval($days); return $this->db->super_query( "SELECT t.*, u.name as username, u.foto as avatar, c.name as cat_name, c.alt_name as cat_slug, lu.name as last_username FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_topics t LEFT JOIN " . USERPREFIX . "_users u ON u.user_id = t.user_id LEFT JOIN " . USERPREFIX . "_users lu ON lu.user_id = t.last_user_id LEFT JOIN " . PREFIX . "_forum_cats c ON c.id = t.cat_id WHERE t.is_deleted='0' AND t.last_post_date > DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL $days DAY) ORDER BY t.last_post_date DESC LIMIT $offset, $per_page", true ); } public function countActiveTopics($days = 7) { $days = intval($days); $r = $this->db->super_query( "SELECT COUNT(*) as c FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_topics WHERE is_deleted='0' AND last_post_date > DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL $days DAY)" ); return intval($r['c']); } public function addPoints($user_id, $points) { $user_id = intval($user_id); $points = intval($points); if($user_id <= 0 || $points == 0) return; $this->db->query("UPDATE " . USERPREFIX . "_users SET forum_points = forum_points + $points WHERE user_id = '$user_id'"); $this->updateUserRank($user_id); } public function updateUserRank($user_id) { $user_id = intval($user_id); $user = $this->db->super_query("SELECT forum_points FROM " . USERPREFIX . "_users WHERE user_id = '$user_id'"); if(!$user) return; $rank = $this->db->super_query( "SELECT id FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_ranks WHERE points <= '" . intval($user['forum_points']) . "' ORDER BY points DESC LIMIT 1" ); if($rank) { $this->db->query("UPDATE " . USERPREFIX . "_users SET forum_rank_id = '{$rank['id']}' WHERE user_id = '$user_id'"); } } public function updatePostCount($user_id) { $user_id = intval($user_id); $cnt = $this->db->super_query("SELECT COUNT(*) as c FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_posts WHERE user_id = '$user_id' AND is_deleted = '0'"); $this->db->query("UPDATE " . USERPREFIX . "_users SET forum_post_count = '{$cnt['c']}' WHERE user_id = '$user_id'"); } public function logAction($action, $topic_id = 0, $post_id = 0) { $mod_id = $this->getUserId(); $ip = $this->db->safesql($_SERVER['REMOTE_ADDR']); $action = $this->db->safesql($action); $topic_id = intval($topic_id); $post_id = intval($post_id); $target = $post_id > 0 ? 'post' : 'topic'; $this->db->query("INSERT INTO " . PREFIX . "_forum_logs (mod_id, action, target_type, topic_id, post_id, date, ip) VALUES ('$mod_id', '$action', '$target', '$topic_id', '$post_id', NOW(), '$ip')"); } public function reportPost($post_id, $reason) { if(!$this->isLogged()) return ['error' => fl('forum_err_must_login')]; $post_id = intval($post_id); $reason = trim($reason); $user_id = $this->getUserId(); $reporter = $this->db->safesql($this->user['name']); if(mb_strlen($reason) < 5) return ['error' => fl('forum_err_complaint_short')]; $dup = $this->db->super_query( "SELECT id FROM " . PREFIX . "_complaint WHERE `from` = '$reporter' AND text LIKE '[FORUM]%' AND news_id = '0'" ); if($dup) return ['error' => fl('forum_err_complaint_dup')]; $post = $this->db->super_query( "SELECT p.topic_id, t.title, t.alt_name FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_posts p LEFT JOIN " . PREFIX . "_forum_topics t ON t.id = p.topic_id WHERE p.id = '$post_id' AND p.is_deleted = '0'" ); if(!$post) return ['error' => fl('forum_err_post_not_found')]; $raw_topic_link = forum_url('forum_topic', ['newsid' => $post['topic_id']]); // D├εZELTME: htmlspecialchars kald─▒r─▒ld─▒, ├πift encode ├╢nlendi $raw_complaint_text = "[FORUM] Mesaj ID: #$post_id | Konu: {$post['title']} | Link: $raw_topic_link | Neden: $reason"; $complaint_text = $this->db->safesql($raw_complaint_text); $this->db->query( "INSERT INTO " . PREFIX . "_complaint (news_id, `from`, text, date) VALUES ('0', '$reporter', '$complaint_text', NOW())" ); return ['success' => true, 'msg' => fl('forum_ok_complaint')]; } public function getAttachments($post_id) { $post_id = intval($post_id); return $this->db->super_query( "SELECT * FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_attachments WHERE post_id = '$post_id' ORDER BY id ASC", true ); } public function getTopicAttachments($topic_id) { $topic_id = intval($topic_id); return $this->db->super_query( "SELECT a.*, p.date as post_date FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_attachments a LEFT JOIN " . PREFIX . "_forum_posts p ON p.id = a.post_id WHERE a.topic_id = '$topic_id' ORDER BY a.id ASC", true ); } public function saveAttachment($post_id, $topic_id, $filename, $original_name, $filesize, $filetype, $file_path = '') { $post_id = intval($post_id); $topic_id = intval($topic_id); $user_id = $this->getUserId(); $filename = $this->db->safesql($filename); $original_name = $this->db->safesql($original_name); $filesize = intval($filesize); $filetype = $this->db->safesql(strtolower($filetype)); $is_image = in_array($filetype, ['jpg','jpeg','png','gif','webp']) ? 1 : 0; // MIME tipi do─θrulama $mime_type = ''; if($file_path && file_exists($file_path)) { if(function_exists('finfo_open')) { $finfo = finfo_open(FILEINFO_MIME_TYPE); $mime_type = finfo_file($finfo, $file_path); finfo_close($finfo); } // MIME ile uzant─▒ uyu┼θuyor mu kontrol et $allowed_mimes = [ 'jpg' => ['image/jpeg'], 'jpeg' => ['image/jpeg'], 'png' => ['image/png'], 'gif' => ['image/gif'], 'webp' => ['image/webp'], 'pdf' => ['application/pdf'], 'zip' => ['application/zip','application/x-zip-compressed'], 'rar' => ['application/x-rar-compressed','application/vnd.rar'], 'doc' => ['application/msword'], 'docx' => ['application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.wordprocessingml.document'], ]; if(isset($allowed_mimes[$filetype]) && $mime_type) { if(!in_array($mime_type, $allowed_mimes[$filetype])) { return ['error' => 'Dosya t├╝r├╝ do─θrulanamad─▒!']; } } // SHA256 hash - duplicate tespiti $file_hash = hash_file('sha256', $file_path); } else { $file_hash = ''; } $mime_safe = $this->db->safesql($mime_type); $hash_safe = $this->db->safesql($file_hash); $this->db->query( "INSERT INTO " . PREFIX . "_forum_attachments (post_id, topic_id, user_id, filename, original_name, filesize, filetype, mime_type, file_hash, is_image, date) VALUES ('$post_id', '$topic_id', '$user_id', '$filename', '$original_name', '$filesize', '$filetype', '$mime_safe', '$hash_safe', '$is_image', NOW())" ); return $this->db->insert_id(); } public function deleteAttachment($attach_id) { $attach_id = intval($attach_id); $attach = $this->db->super_query("SELECT * FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_attachments WHERE id = '$attach_id'"); if(!$attach) return false; $user_id = $this->getUserId(); $own = $attach['user_id'] == $user_id; if(!$own && !$this->canDo('moderate')) return false; $filepath = ROOT_DIR . '/uploads/forum/' . $attach['filename']; if(file_exists($filepath)) @unlink($filepath); $this->db->query("DELETE FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_attachments WHERE id = '$attach_id'"); return true; } public function incrementDownload($attach_id) { $attach_id = intval($attach_id); $this->db->query("UPDATE " . PREFIX . "_forum_attachments SET downloads = downloads + 1 WHERE id = '$attach_id'"); } public function getStats() { $cached = dle_cache("forum_stats", $this->config['skin']); if($cached) return unserialize($cached); $stats = [ 'total_topics' => intval($this->db->super_query("SELECT COUNT(*) as c FROM " . "_forum_likes")['c']), 'total_complaints' => intval($this->db->super_query("SELECT COUNT(*) as c FROM " . PREFIX . "_complaint WHERE text LIKE '[FORUM]%'")['c']), // Son Uye: avatar + profil linki icin ek alanlar 'last_user' => $this->db->super_query("SELECT user_id, name, foto FROM " . USERPREFIX . PREFIX . "_forum_posts p LEFT JOIN " . USERPREFIX . "_users u ON u.user_id = p.user_id LEFT JOIN " . PREFIX . "_forum_topics t ON t.id = p.topic_id LEFT JOIN " . PREFIX . '_' . $this->getUserId() . '_' . bin2hex(random_bytes(4)) . '.' . $ext; $dest = $upload_dir . $safe_name; $is_image = in_array($ext, $image_types); if($is_image && function_exists('imagecreatefromstring')) { $src = @imagecreatefromstring(file_get_contents($tmp)); if($src) { $ow = imagesx($src); $oh = imagesy($src); if($ow > 1920 || $oh > 1920) { $r = min(1920/$ow, 1920/$oh); $nw = intval($ow*$r); $nh = intval($oh*$r); $ni = imagecreatetruecolor($nw, $nh); if($ext === 'png') { imagealphablending($ni, false); imagesavealpha($ni, true); } imagecopyresampled($ni, $src, 0,0,0,0,$nw,$nh,$ow,$oh); imagedestroy($src); $src = $ni; } if(function_exists('imagewebp')) { $safe_name = substr($safe_name, 0, strrpos($safe_name, '.')) . '.webp'; $dest = $upload_dir . $safe_name; imagewebp($src, $dest, 82); } else { imagejpeg($src, $dest, 85); } imagedestroy($src); $size = filesize($dest); } else { move_uploaded_file($tmp, $dest); } } else { move_uploaded_file($tmp, $dest); } $fe = strtolower(pathinfo($safe_name, PATHINFO_EXTENSION)); $att = $this->saveAttachment($post_id, $topic_id, $safe_name, $name, $size, $fe); $results[] = ['success' => true, 'id' => $att, 'url' => $upload_url . $safe_name, 'name' => $name, 'is_image' => in_array($fe, $image_types) ? 1 : 0]; } return $results; } public function parseMentions($raw_text, $topic_id, $post_id) { preg_match_all('/@([a-zA-Z0-9_\-\.]{2,30})/', $raw_text, $m); if(empty($m[1])) return; foreach(array_unique($m[1]) as $uname) { $us = $this->db->safesql($uname); $u = $this->db->super_query("SELECT user_id FROM " . USERPREFIX . "_users WHERE name='$us'"); if($u) $this->sendNotif(intval($u['user_id']), 'mention', $topic_id, $post_id); } } public function bumpTopic($topic_id) { if(!$this->isLogged()) return ['error' => fl('forum_err_must_login')]; $topic_id = intval($topic_id); $topic = $this->getTopicById($topic_id); if(!$topic) return ['error' => fl('forum_err_topic_not_found')]; if($topic['is_locked']) return ['error' => fl('forum_err_bump_locked')]; $uid = $this->getUserId(); if($topic['user_id'] != $uid && !$this->canDo('moderate')) return ['error' => fl('forum_err_bump_owner')]; $row = $this->db->super_query("SELECT last_bump_date FROM " . "_forum_topics WHERE id='$topic_id'"); if($row && !empty($row['last_bump_date']) && $row['last_bump_date'] != '0000-00-00 00:00:00') { $cooldown = intval($this->getSetting('bump_cooldown_hours') ?: 24) * 3600; if((time() - strtotime($row['last_bump_date'])) < $cooldown) { $kalan = ceil(($cooldown - (time() - strtotime($row['last_bump_date']))) / 3600); return ['error' => sprintf(fl('forum_err_bump_cooldown'), $kalan)]; } } $this->db->query("UPDATE " . PREFIX . "_forum_topics SET last_post_date=NOW(), last_bump_date=NOW() WHERE id='$topic_id'"); $this->logAction('bump_topic', $topic_id, 0); return ['success' => true, 'message' => fl('forum_ok_bump')]; } public function moveTopic($topic_id, $new_cat_id) { if(!$this->canDo('moderate')) return ['error' => fl('forum_err_no_permission')]; $topic_id = intval($topic_id); $new_cat_id = intval($new_cat_id); $topic = $this->getTopicById($topic_id); if(!$topic) return ['error' => fl('forum_err_topic_not_found')]; if(!$this->getCatById($new_cat_id)) return ['error' => fl('forum_err_move_cat')]; $old = intval($topic['cat_id']); $this->db->query("UPDATE " . PREFIX . USERPREFIX . "_users WHERE user_id='" . intval($user_id) . "'"); return (intval($r['forum_post_count'] ?? 0) < $threshold); } public function getPendingPosts($page = 1, $per = 20) { $offset = (max(1,$page)-1)*$per; return $this->db->super_query("SELECT p.*, u.name as username, t.title as topic_title FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_posts WHERE is_approved='0' AND is_deleted='0'")['c']); } public function approvePost($post_id) { if(!$this->canDo('moderate')) return ['error' => fl('forum_err_no_permission')]; $post_id = intval($post_id); $post = $this->db->super_query("SELECT * FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_posts WHERE id='$post_id'"); if(!$post) return ['error' => fl('forum_err_msg_not_found')]; $this->db->query("UPDATE " . PREFIX . "_forum_topics SET replies = replies + 1, last_post_date=NOW(), last_user_id='{$post['user_id']}', last_post_id='$post_id' WHERE id='{$post['topic_id']}'"); $this->updateCatStats($t['cat_id']); } $this->logAction('approve_post', $post['topic_id'], $post_id); return ['success' => true]; } public function rejectPost($post_id) { if(!$this->canDo('moderate')) return ['error' => fl('forum_err_no_permission')]; $post_id = intval($post_id); $this->db->query("UPDATE " . PREFIX . '; return $html; } } ?>

<?php
/*
=====================================================
 DLE Native Forum (Nexus) - by Dlehub
-----------------------------------------------------
 https://github.com/dlehub
-----------------------------------------------------
 File: engine/forum/init.php (Router & i18n Loader)
=====================================================
*/

if(!defined('DATALIFEENGINE')) die("Hacking attempt!");

// SEO Helper Fonksiyonlar─▒
include_once (DLEPlugins::Check(ENGINE_DIR . '/forum/forum.helper.php'));

// --- Z─░YARET├Θ─░ OTURUM TAKIBI ---
if(!$is_logged && !isset($_SESSION['forum_visit_start'])) {
    $_SESSION['forum_visit_start'] = time();
}

/**
 * 1. GLOBAL DE─η─░┼ηKENLER─░ HAZIRLA
 * DLE i├πerisindeki ana de─θi┼θkenleri i├πeri aktar─▒yoruz ki 
 * sidebar ve sistem fonksiyonlar─▒ hatas─▒z ├πal─▒┼θs─▒n.
 */
global $db, $config, $member_id, $is_logged, $tpl, $metatags, $lang, $user_group;

/**
 * 2. ├ΘOK D─░LL─░ (i18n) S─░STEM─░ Y├εKLE
 * DLE'nin o anki se├πili diline g├╢re (TR/EN/RU) dosyay─▒ ├πeker.
 */
$selected_lang = (isset($config['langs']) && $config['langs'] != "") ? $config['langs'] : 'Turkish';
$_forum_lng_path = ROOT_DIR . '/language/' . $selected_lang . '/forum.lng.php';

// Sidebar bozulmamas─▒ i├πin dosyay─▒ y├╝klemeden ├╢nce global $lang diyoruz
if (file_exists($_forum_lng_path)) {
    include (DLEPlugins::Check($_forum_lng_path));
} else {
    // Fallback: E─θer se├πili dilde dosya yoksa ana dile (T├╝rk├πe) d├╢n
    $_forum_fallback = ROOT_DIR . '/language/Turkish/forum.lng.php';
    if (file_exists($_forum_fallback)) include (DLEPlugins::Check($_forum_fallback));
}

// $lang dizisinin varl─▒─θ─▒n─▒ garanti alt─▒na al
if (!isset($lang) || !is_array($lang)) $lang = array();

/**
 * 3. fl() HELPER FONKS─░YONU (Eksiksiz S├╝r├╝m)
 * Dil anahtarlar─▒n─▒ ├πekmek ve sprintf ile dinamik veri basmak i├πin.
 */
if (!function_exists('fl')) {
    function fl($key, ...$args) {
        global $lang;
        $val = (isset($lang[$key]) && $lang[$key] !== '') ? $lang[$key] : '';
        if ($val === '' && count($args) === 1 && is_string($args[0]) && $args[0] !== '') {
            return $args[0];
        }
        return ($val !== '' && count($args) > 0) ? sprintf($val, ...$args) : ($val ?: $key);
    }
}

/**
 * 4. ├ΘEK─░RDEK SINIF VE BA┼ηLATICI
 */
if(!class_exists('Forum')) {
    include_once (DLEPlugins::Check(ENGINE_DIR . '/forum/classes/forum.class.php'));
}
$Forum = new Forum($db, $member_id, $config);

/**
 * 5. ROUTER (AKSIYON Y├ΨNET─░M─░)
 * PHP 8+ uyumlu, t├╝m case'leri kapsayan yap─▒.
 */
$raw_action = (isset($_GET['action']) && is_string($_GET['action'])) ? $_GET['action'] : 
              ((isset($_POST['action']) && is_string($_POST['action'])) ? $_POST['action'] : 'main');

// G├╝venlik: Sadece harf, rakam ve alt ├πizgi (LFI/RFI korumas─▒)
$action = preg_replace('/[^a-z0-9_]/', '', strtolower($raw_action));

switch ($action) {
    
    // Kategori ve Konu Listesi
    case 'category':
        include_once (DLEPlugins::Check(ENGINE_DIR . '/forum/actions/category.php'));
        break;

    // Konu Detay─▒ ve Mesajlar
    case 'topic':
        include_once (DLEPlugins::Check(ENGINE_DIR . '/forum/actions/topic.php'));
        break;

    // Yeni Konu A├πma Formu/─░┼θlemi
    case 'new_topic':
        include_once (DLEPlugins::Check(ENGINE_DIR . '/forum/actions/new_topic.php'));
        break;

    // Forum ─░├πi Arama
    case 'search':
        include_once (DLEPlugins::Check(ENGINE_DIR . '/forum/actions/search.php'));
        break;

    // ├Ψzel Mesajlar (Conversations)
    case 'pm':
        include_once (DLEPlugins::Check(ENGINE_DIR . '/forum/actions/pm.php'));
        break;

    // Kullan─▒c─▒ Bildirimleri
    case 'notifications':
        include_once (DLEPlugins::Check(ENGINE_DIR . '/forum/actions/notifications.php'));
        break;

    // Kullan─▒c─▒ Forum Mesajlar─▒
    case 'user_posts':
        include_once (DLEPlugins::Check(ENGINE_DIR . '/forum/actions/user_posts.php'));
        break;

    // Yan─▒tlanmam─▒┼θ Konular
    case 'unanswered':
        include_once (DLEPlugins::Check(ENGINE_DIR . '/forum/actions/unanswered.php'));
        break;

    // Aktif Konular
    case 'active':
        include_once (DLEPlugins::Check(ENGINE_DIR . '/forum/actions/active.php'));
        break;

    // Etiket Sayfas─▒
    case 'tag':
        include_once (DLEPlugins::Check(ENGINE_DIR . '/forum/actions/tag.php'));
        break;

    // Be─θeni, Bump, Takip, Silme gibi t├╝m AJAX i┼θlemleri
    case 'ajax':
        include_once (DLEPlugins::Check(ENGINE_DIR . '/forum/actions/ajax.php'));
        break;

    // Ana Sayfa (Kategori Listesi)
    case 'main':
    default:
        include_once (DLEPlugins::Check(ENGINE_DIR . '/forum/actions/main.php'));
        break;
}
?>

<?php
/*
=====================================================
 DLE Native Forum (Nexus) - by Dlehub
-----------------------------------------------------
 https://github.com/dlehub
-----------------------------------------------------
 Copyright (c) 2024-2026 Dlehub & Elegance
=====================================================
 This code is protected by copyright
=====================================================
 File: engine/forum/actions/ajax.php
-----------------------------------------------------
 Use: AJAX isteklerini (be─θeni, takip, bildirim, konu aksiyonlar─▒) i┼θleme
=====================================================
*/
if(!defined('DATALIFEENGINE')) die("Hacking attempt!");

function jout($data) {
    if (ob_get_length()) ob_clean(); // Buffer temizle: ├╢nceki uyar─▒/bo┼θluk JSON'─▒ bozmas─▒n
    header('Content-Type: application/json; charset=utf-8');
    echo json_encode($data, JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE | JSON_PARTIAL_OUTPUT_ON_ERROR);
    exit;
}
if(!$is_logged) jout(['error' => fl('forum_err_must_login')]);
 $token = isset($_POST['csrf']) ? $_POST['csrf'] : '';
 $token = $token ?: (isset($_REQUEST['user_hash']) ? $_REQUEST['user_hash'] : '');
 $act   = isset($_POST['act']) ? $_POST['act'] : '';

if(!$Forum->verifyCsrf($token)) jout(['error' => 'G├╝venlik do─θrulamas─▒ ba┼θar─▒s─▒z!']);

switch($act) {

    case 'like':
        $post_id = intval($_POST['post_id'] ?? 0);
        $ltype   = (isset($_POST['ltype']) && $_POST['ltype'] === 'dislike') ? 'dislike' : 'like';
        jout($Forum->toggleLike($post_id, $ltype));
        break;

    case 'follow':
        $topic_id = intval($_POST['topic_id'] ?? 0);
        jout($Forum->toggleFollow($topic_id));
        break;

    case 'mark_read':
        $topic_id = intval($_POST['topic_id'] ?? 0);
        $post_id  = intval($_POST['post_id']  ?? 0);
        $Forum->markRead($topic_id, $post_id);
        jout(['success' => true]);
        break;

    case 'notif_count':
        jout(['count' => $Forum->countUnreadNotifs()]);
        break;

    case 'notifs':
        $Forum->markNotifsRead();
        $notifs = $Forum->getNotifs($Forum->getUserId(), 15);
        jout(['notifs' => $notifs]);
        break;

    case 'edit_post':
        $post_id  = intval($_POST['post_id']  ?? 0);
        $new_text = trim($_POST['text'] ?? '');
        jout($Forum->editPost($post_id, $new_text));
        break;

    case 'delete_post':
        $post_id = intval($_POST['post_id'] ?? 0);
        jout($Forum->deletePost($post_id));
        break;

    case 'delete_topic':
        if(!$Forum->canDo('delete_any')) jout(['error' => fl('forum_err_no_permission')]);
        $topic_id = intval($_POST['topic_id'] ?? 0);
        jout(['success' => $Forum->deleteTopic($topic_id)]);
        break;

    case 'lock_topic':
        $topic_id = intval($_POST['topic_id'] ?? 0);
        $state    = intval($_POST['state']    ?? 0);
        jout($Forum->lockTopic($topic_id, $state));
        break;

    case 'pin_topic':
        $topic_id = intval($_POST['topic_id'] ?? 0);
        $state    = intval($_POST['state']    ?? 0);
        jout($Forum->pinTopic($topic_id, $state));
        break;

    case 'send_pm':
        // D├εZELTME: PHP 8 dizi g├╢nderimini engellemek i├πin is_string() eklendi
        $to_name = (isset($_POST['to_user']) && is_string($_POST['to_user'])) ? trim($_POST['to_user']) : '';
        
        if(empty($to_name)) {
            jout(['error' => fl('forum_err_pm_invalid')]);
        }
        
        $to_row  = $db->super_query("SELECT user_id FROM " . USERPREFIX . "_users WHERE name='" . $db->safesql($to_name) . "'");
        
        if(!$to_row) {
            jout(['error' => fl('forum_err_pm_notfound')]);
        }
        
        $title = trim($_POST['title'] ?? '');
        $text  = trim($_POST['text']  ?? '');
        
        jout($Forum->sendPm($to_row['user_id'], $title, $text));
        break;

    case 'delete_pm':
        $pm_id = intval($_POST['pm_id'] ?? 0);
        // D├εZELTME: Sadece 'sender' veya 'receiver' kabul edilmeli, di─θer t├╝rl├╝ veriler reddedilmeli
        $raw_by = (isset($_POST['by']) && is_string($_POST['by'])) ? strtolower(trim($_POST['by'])) : 'receiver';
        $by = in_array($raw_by, ['sender', 'receiver']) ? $raw_by : 'receiver';
        
        jout($Forum->deletePm($pm_id, $by));
        break;

    case 'new_topic':
        $cat_id = intval($_POST['cat_id'] ?? 0);
        $title  = trim($_POST['title']    ?? '');
        $text   = trim($_POST['text']     ?? '');
        jout($Forum->createTopic($cat_id, $title, $text));
        break;

    case 'delete_attachment':
        $attach_id = intval($_POST['attach_id'] ?? 0);
        jout($Forum->deleteAttachment($attach_id));
        break;

    case 'download_attachment':
        $attach_id = intval($_POST['attach_id'] ?? 0);
        $Forum->incrementDownload($attach_id);
        jout(['success' => true]);
        break;

    case 'bump_topic':
        $topic_id = intval($_POST['topic_id'] ?? 0);
        jout($Forum->bumpTopic($topic_id));
        break;

    case 'move_topic':
        if(!$Forum->canDo('moderate')) jout(['error' => fl('forum_err_no_permission')]);
        jout($Forum->moveTopic(intval($_POST['topic_id'] ?? 0), intval($_POST['new_cat_id'] ?? 0)));
        break;

    case 'upload':
        jout($Forum->handleUpload(intval($_POST['post_id'] ?? 0), intval($_POST['topic_id'] ?? 0)));
        break;

    case 'approve_post':
        jout($Forum->approvePost(intval($_POST['post_id'] ?? 0)));
        break;

    case 'reject_post':
        jout($Forum->rejectPost(intval($_POST['post_id'] ?? 0)));
        break;

    default:
        jout(['error' => fl('forum_err_invalid_action')]);
}
?>

if (!defined('DATALIFEENGINE')) {
    die("Hacking attempt!");
}

// SEO Fonksiyonlar─▒n─▒ Y├╝kle (Hata almamak i├πin kontrol ekledik)
if (!function_exists('forum_url')) {
    include_once (DLEPlugins::Check(ENGINE_DIR . '/forum/forum.helper.php'));
}

// --- PARAMETR─░K L─░M─░T ---
// Kullan─▒m: {include file="engine/modules/forum_block.php?limit=12"}
// $_GET['limit'] DLE include mekanizmas─▒ ile aktar─▒l─▒r.
// intval ile zorla integer yap, bo┼θsa 5, bounds: 1-50 aras─▒.
$limit = 5;

if (isset($_GET['limit'])) {
    $limit = intval($_GET['limit']);
}

if ($limit < 1) {
    $limit = 5;
}
if ($limit > 50) {
    $limit = 50;
}

// Cache key: skin + dil + limit kombinasyonu.
// Her limit de─θeri i├πin ayr─▒ cache έΑΦ yanl─▒┼θ veri d├╢n├╝┼θ├╝ yok.
$cache_key    = "forum_block_" . $config['skin'] . "_" . $config['langs'] . "_" . $limit;
$forum_block  = dle_cache($cache_key, $config['skin']);

if (!$forum_block) {
    $noavatar_path = rtrim($config['http_home_url'], '/') . '/templates/' . $config['skin'] . '/dleimages/noavatar.png';

    $db->query("SELECT t.id, t.title, t.alt_name, t.date, t.replies, u.name, u.foto, c.name as cat_name, c.alt_name as cat_alt_name
                FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_topics t
                LEFT JOIN " . USERPREFIX . "_users u ON t.user_id = u.user_id
                LEFT JOIN " . PREFIX . "_forum_cats c ON t.cat_id = c.id
                WHERE t.is_deleted = '0'
                ORDER BY t.date DESC LIMIT " . $limit);

    $forum_block = "";
    $row_count   = 0;

    // Template'i d├╢ng├╝ ├╢ncesi bir kez y├╝kle
    $tpl->load_template('forum/forum_block.tpl');

    while ($row = $db->get_row()) {
        if (!is_array($row)) {
            break;
        }

        $row_count++;

        // XSS KORUMASI: T├╝m kullan─▒c─▒ verileri kat─▒ escape ile template'e aktar─▒l─▒r.
        $safe_title = htmlspecialchars($row['title'], ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8');

        $safe_name    = isset($row['name']) && is_string($row['name']) ? htmlspecialchars($row['name'], ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8') : fl('forum_guest');
        $safe_catname = isset($row['cat_name']) && is_string($row['cat_name']) ? htmlspecialchars($row['cat_name'], ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8') : '';

        $safe_id      = intval($row['id']);
        $safe_replies = intval($row['replies']);

        // Tarih: strtotime ba┼θar─▒s─▒z olursa bug├╝n├╝n tarihi kullan─▒l─▒r
        $timestamp = strtotime($row['date']);
        if ($timestamp === false) {
            $timestamp = time();
        }
        $safe_date = langdate("j F Y", $timestamp);

        // Avatar: foto varsa onu kullan, yoksa default noavatar
        $safe_foto = isset($row['foto']) && is_string($row['foto']) && $row['foto'] !== '' ? $row['foto'] : '';
        if ($safe_foto !== '') {
            // Dosya yolu injection kontrol├╝: ../ veya ba┼θtaki / engellenir
            $safe_foto = ltrim($safe_foto, '/');
            if (strpos($safe_foto, '..') !== false) {
                $safe_foto = '';
            }
        }
        $avatar = ($safe_foto !== '') ? rtrim($config['http_home_url'], '/') . '/' . $safe_foto : $noavatar_path;

        $safe_link = forum_url('forum_topic', [
            'newsid' => $safe_id,
            'news_name' => $row['alt_name'],
            'category' => $row['cat_alt_name']
        ]);

        $tpl->set('{title}', $safe_title);
        $tpl->set('{link}', $safe_link);
        $tpl->set('{author}', $safe_name);
        $tpl->set('{category}', $safe_catname);
        $tpl->set('{replies}', $safe_replies);
        $tpl->set('{date}', $safe_date);
        $tpl->set('{avatar}', $avatar);

        $tpl->compile('forum_block_content');
    }

    // Sorgu sonras─▒ bellek temizli─θi
    $db->free();

    // Sonu├π: En az bir kay─▒t bulunduysa compiled HTML'i al, bo┼θsa sessizce ge├π
    if ($row_count > 0 && isset($tpl->result['forum_block_content']) && is_string($tpl->result['forum_block_content'])) {
        $forum_block = $tpl->result['forum_block_content'];
    } else {
        $forum_block = '';
    }

    // Template result'─▒ s─▒f─▒rla έΑΦ di─θer mod├╝llerle ├πak─▒┼θmaz
    $tpl->result['forum_block_content'] = '';

    // ├Ψnbelle─θe yaz
    create_cache($cache_key, $forum_block, $config['skin']);
}

echo $forum_block;
?>

'; } $tpl->load_template('forum/user_posts.tpl'); $tpl->set('{breadcrumb}', $Forum->getBreadcrumb(0, 0, fl('forum_user_posts', $user_name))); if(!isset($tpl->result['user_posts_tpl']) || empty($tpl->result['user_posts_tpl'])) { // E─θer ┼θablon dosyas─▒ yoksa varsay─▒lan HTML olu┼θtur $output = '
' . htmlspecialchars($user_name) . '
Toplam Mesaj: ' . $total_count . '
Forum Mesajlar─▒ (' . $total_count . ')
' . $posts_html . ' ' . $pagination . '
'; $tpl->result['content'] = $output; } else { $tpl->set('{user_name}', htmlspecialchars($user_name)); $tpl->set('{user_avatar}', $user_avatar); $tpl->set('{total_posts}', $total_count); $tpl->set('{posts_list}', $posts_html); $tpl->set('{pagination}', $pagination); $tpl->compile('content'); } $tpl->clear(); $metatags['title'] = htmlspecialchars($user_name) . <?php
if (!defined('DATALIFEENGINE')) die("Hacking attempt!");

/**
 * forum_url() έΑΦ DLE 18 / 19+ ├Θift Uyumlu SEO Link ├εretici
 *
 * DLE 19+  έΗΤ DLEUrl::BuildUrl() kullan─▒r (FastRoute motoru)
 * DLE 18   έΗΤ .htaccess mod_rewrite kurallar─▒na uygun URL ├╝retir
 * Fallback έΗΤ Her iki durumda da parametreli URL d├╢ner (SEO kapal─▒ysa)
 *
 * Kullan─▒m:
 *   forum_url('forum_main')
 *   forum_url('forum_cat',   ['category' => $alt_name])
 *   forum_url('forum_topic', ['newsid' => $id, 'news_name' => $slug, 'category' => $cat_alt])
 *   forum_url('forum_user',  ['user' => $username])
 *   forum_url('forum_pm_read', ['newsid' => $pm_id])
 */
function forum_url($rule, $params = []) {
    global $config;

    $base = rtrim($config['http_home_url'], '/') . '/';

    // έΦΑέΦΑ DLE 19+: DLEUrl sistemi έΦΑέΦΑέΦΑέΦΑέΦΑέΦΑέΦΑέΦΑέΦΑέΦΑέΦΑέΦΑέΦΑέΦΑέΦΑέΦΑέΦΑέΦΑέΦΑέΦΑέΦΑέΦΑέΦΑέΦΑέΦΑέΦΑέΦΑέΦΑέΦΑέΦΑέΦΑέΦΑέΦΑέΦΑέΦΑέΦΑέΦΑέΦΑέΦΑέΦΑέΦΑέΦΑέΦΑέΦΑέΦΑέΦΑ
    if (class_exists('DLEUrl') && !empty($config['allow_alt_url'])) {
        $url = DLEUrl::BuildUrl('custom.' . $rule, $params);
        // BuildUrl ba┼θar─▒s─▒z olursa (kural yok, {placeholder} kald─▒ysa) fallback'e d├╝┼θ
        if (!empty($url) && strpos($url, '{') === false) {
            return $url;
        }
    }

    // έΦΑέΦΑ DLE 18 + .htaccess modu veya SEO aktif / DLEUrl fallback έΦΑέΦΑέΦΑέΦΑέΦΑέΦΑέΦΑέΦΑέΦΑέΦΑέΦΑέΦΑέΦΑ
    // SEO URL'leri aktifse (DLE 18'de $config['allow_alt_url'] == 1)
    if (!empty($config['allow_alt_url'])) {
        switch ($rule) {
            case 'forum_main':
                return $base . 'forum/';

            case 'forum_cat':
                $cat = isset($params['category']) ? urlencode($params['category']) : '';
                return $base . 'forum/' . $cat . '/';

            case 'forum_topic':
                $newsid    = isset($params['newsid'])    ? intval($params['newsid'])    : 0;
                $news_name = isset($params['news_name']) ? urlencode($params['news_name']) : 'konu';
                $category  = isset($params['category'])  ? urlencode($params['category'])  : '';
                // Kategori slug'─▒ olmadan da ├πal─▒┼θs─▒n
                if ($category !== '') {
                    return $base . 'forum/' . $category . '/' . $newsid . '-' . $news_name . '.html';
                }
                return $base . 'forum/konu/' . $newsid . '-' . $news_name . '.html';

            case 'forum_user':
                $user = isset($params['user']) ? urlencode($params['user']) : '';
                return $base . 'forum/user/' . $user . '/';

            case 'forum_new_topic':
                return $base . 'forum/new-topic/';

            case 'forum_search':
                return $base . 'forum/search/';

            case 'forum_notifications':
                return $base . 'forum/notifications/';

            case 'forum_pm':
                return $base . 'forum/pm/';

            case 'forum_pm_read':
                $id = isset($params['newsid']) ? intval($params['newsid']) : 0;
                return $base . 'forum/pm/read/' . $id . '/';

            case 'forum_ajax':
                return $base . 'forum/ajax/';
        }
    }

    // έΦΑέΦΑ Fallback: SEO kapal─▒ έΑΦ klasik parametreli URL έΦΑέΦΑέΦΑέΦΑέΦΑέΦΑέΦΑέΦΑέΦΑέΦΑέΦΑέΦΑέΦΑέΦΑέΦΑέΦΑέΦΑέΦΑέΦΑέΦΑέΦΑέΦΑέΦΑέΦΑέΦΑ
    $query_map = [
        'forum_main'          => '',
        'forum_cat'           => '&action=category&cat='    . urlencode($params['category'] ?? ''),
        'forum_topic'         => '&action=topic&id='        . intval($params['newsid'] ?? 0),
        'forum_user'          => '&action=user_posts&user=' . urlencode($params['user'] ?? ''),
        'forum_new_topic'     => '&action=new_topic',
        'forum_search'        => '&action=search',
        'forum_notifications' => '&action=notifications',
        'forum_pm'            => '&action=pm',
        'forum_pm_read'       => '&action=pm&sub=read&id='  . intval($params['newsid'] ?? 0),
        'forum_ajax'          => '&action=ajax',
    ];

    return $config['http_home_url'] . 'index.php?do=forum' . ($query_map[$rule] ?? '');
}

/**
 * forum_fix_url() έΑΦ Mevcut URL'e parametre ekler (& / ? otomatik se├πer)
 */
function forum_fix_url($url, $param) {
    if (empty($url)) return '';
    $sep = (strpos($url, '?') === false) ? '?' : '&';
    return $url . $sep . $param;
}

'; foreach([1,7,30] as $d) { $active_cls = $days == $d ? 'btn-primary' : 'btn-default'; $day_text = $d == 1 ? fl('forum_filter_today', 'Bug├╝n') : sprintf(fl('forum_filter_days', 'Son %d G├╝n'), $d); $day_filter .= ''; $day_filter .= $day_text; $day_filter .= ''; } $day_filter .= '
